basic_details.job_title: DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 29 Lab Technicians, Nursing Therapist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Up to 40 years for most posts, up to 59 years for others
age_limit.details: Up to 40 years for most posts. Up to 59 years for other posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Two years Diploma in Radio Diagnoses Technology or B.Sc Radiography, Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT), B.Sc/Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology with experience, Bachelors/Master's in Occupational Therapy, Bachelor's in Speech and Language Pathology, Diploma Nursing Therapy
qualification.details: Radiographer: Must have passed Two years Diploma course in Radio Diagnoses Technology or a Degree in B.Sc. (Radiography and imaging Technology) / B.Sc (Radio Diagnosis Technology) and B.Sc (Radiology and imaging Technology). Physiotherapist: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from a recognized university. ICTC - Lab Technicians: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) or BMLS, or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) or DMLS with a course duration of at least 2 years. Essential Experience: Two years of experience for B.Sc/Diploma holders, one year for M.Sc holders. Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre: Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized university. Audiologist cum speech Therapist- DEIC: Bachelor's Degree in Speech and Language Pathology from any recognized university in India. Therapeutic Assistant Musculoskeletal Scheme Female-1: Diploma Nursing Therapy. Therapeutic Assistant (Female): Diploma Nursing Therapy. Nursing Therapist/ Therapeutic Assistant: Diploma Nursing Therapy (D.N.T) AYUSH.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre

salary_details.details: Radiographer: Rs. 17,000 Physiotherapist: Rs. 23,000 ICTC - Lab Technicians: Rs. 17,000 Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre: Rs. 23,000 Audiologist cum speech Therapist- DEIC: Rs. 32,000 Therapeutic Assistant Musculoskeletal Scheme Female-1: Rs. 15,000 Therapeutic Assistant (Female): Rs. 13,000 Nursing Therapist/ Therapeutic Assistant: Rs. 13,000

selection_process: Interview Score card Weightage of Marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Namakkal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: namakkal.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DHS Namakkal Various Contractual Posts is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 29 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the District Health Society, Namakkal. These positions are spread across different medical and technical roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including diplomas and degrees in fields like Radiography, Physiotherapy, Medical Laboratory Technology, Occupational Therapy, Speech and Language Pathology, and Nursing Therapy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit generally goes up to 40 years for most posts, with some positions allowing candidates up to 59 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the contractual posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies depending on the post, with figures ranging from Rs. 13,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DHS Namakkal Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an interview, score card evaluation, and weightage of marks. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise details.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society, Namakkal, which is namakkal.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as specified in the application guidelines.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DHS Namakkal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DHS Namakkal Various Contractual Posts is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.
